LSE-HS12-L4-1400P-HSVPA1112-PZQ-CFI-01 • HS Visual & Performing Arts: Media Arts 11–12 • Audience and Venue in Media Arts Productions

The Missing Piece

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a girl. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What was the teacher's lesson about?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about the topic of the teacher's lesson, support that claim with reasoning drawn from the principle he names about every piece, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what the lesson teaches.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  Pr4a (Media Arts, HS Proficient)  |  HS Visual & Performing Arts: Media Arts 11–12 — Audience and Venue in Media Arts Productions
